title: eragrostis capitula
intro: Eragrostis capitula is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of love grass or finger grass. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Eragrostis capitula include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. Eragrostis capitula is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be used in topical applications, such as creams or ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
